hero.headline: Expert care for your car.
hero.lead: Same-day service, clear communication, and repairs performed by AES-certified technicians.
whyBullets: Friendly advisors who explain options in plain language.

about.heading: Star Auto Repair Center - Where Expertise Meets Honesty
about.narrative: We are a family-operated repair facility trusted by Clifton drivers. Every recommendation includes photos, transparent pricing, and practical guidance.
bullets: Free digital inspections with photos and videos
Written warranties on parts and labor
No surprise pricing before work begins

whyUsCards.title: Honest Diagnostics
whyUsCards.description: We show photos of every issue before recommending repairs.

whyUsCards.title: Same-Day Service
whyUsCards.description: Most repairs are completed in 24 hours.

whyUsCards.title: Digital Updates
whyUsCards.description: Text and email progress reports from check-in to pickup.

services.name: Engine Diagnostic
services.description: Full-system diagnostic scan to identify engine warning lights, performance issues, and hidden problems.

services.name: Brake Repair
services.description: Complete brake service — pads, rotors, calipers, fluid. Safe stopping power restored.

services.name: Oil & Filter Change
services.description: Keep your engine running clean with quality oil and a premium filter, plus a quick safety check.

services.name: Tires & Alignment
services.description: Tire mounting, balancing, rotation, and alignment — everything to keep your wheels turning straight.

services.name: NJ State Inspection
services.description: NJ state safety and emissions inspection. Fast turnaround, pass-or-we-fix-it guarantee.

deals.title: Oil Change Special
deals.description: Full synthetic, OEM filter, multi-point check

testimonials.name: Demo Customer A
testimonials.quote: Fair prices, honest diagnosis, and they finished when they said they would. Will be back.

testimonials.name: Demo Customer B
testimonials.quote: Been coming here for five years. They've never pushed a repair I didn't need.

faqs.question: Do I need an appointment?
faqs.answer: Walk-ins welcome, but booking ahead guarantees same-day service. We confirm within 30 minutes.

faqs.question: How long do repairs typically take?
faqs.answer: Most services complete in 2 hours or less. Larger jobs we confirm timing before work begins.

faqs.question: Do you work on all car brands?
faqs.answer: Yes. We service domestic, Asian, and European vehicles including late-model hybrids.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing?
faqs.answer: Yes — we partner with Sunbit for 0% APR financing on qualifying repairs. Ask at check-in.

faqs.question: Is there a waiting area?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Complimentary coffee, Wi-Fi, and a quiet workspace while you wait.

faqs.question: What is your warranty?
faqs.answer: 24 months / 24,000 miles on parts and labor — industry-leading, included on every repair.

emergency.heading: Car Won't Start? We're Here 24/7.
emergency.description: Emergency towing, after-hours repairs, and loaner car options available.

contact.heading: Request Service
contact.description: Tell us what your vehicle needs and we'll confirm timing and pricing quickly.

sectionTitles.dealsLede: Limited-time offers. Mention this page when you book.
